name: api-testing-practice
description: Sample API testing practice project using Playwright API tests.

scripts.test:module-5: npx playwright test "Module 5 - Data Driven and DevOps"
scripts.test:module-5:allure: npx playwright test "Module 5 - Data Driven and DevOps" --reporter=line,allure-playwright
scripts.test:module-7: npx playwright test "Module 7 - Governance and Quality"
scripts.test:module-9: npx playwright test "Module 9 - Backend SQA Skills"
scripts.test:module-10: npx playwright test "Module 10 - Production Backend SQA"
